headline: 4 'Safer' Dividend Buys Out Of Barron's 23 June Better Bets Than T-Bills
summary: Long-term bond yields persist. But investors looking for income can still find plenty of attractive opportunities with dividend-paying stocks that have healthy yields. Read which ones here.

headline: Stock Market Today: Indexes Volatile; Micron Surges, But Apple Makes Sell Signal (Live Coverage)
summary: The stock market was volatile Thursday morning, reversing lower in the opening phase before quickly rebounding.  Apple stock tumbled and technology stocks in general reversed lower.  The Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes opened higher on the stock market today after a stronger-than-expected GDP reading.

headline: US Bancorp Declares SCB & Plans Dividend Hike After 2026 Stress Test
summary: USB passes the Fed's 2026 stress test, maintains strong capital levels and plans to raise its quarterly dividend.
